content: Autonomous reinforcement learning agents can use an episodic-semantic hybrid node representation learning framework to structure the intrinsic reward signal from the 2025 configurable ICM curiosity mechanism, turning scattered novel environmental observations into hierarchically organized, long-term reusable exploration incentives. This hybrid representation solves a key 2025 ICM limitation of overvaluing noisy, meaningless novel states by filtering novelty through aligned semantic generalizations pulled from accumulated episodic exploration memory.
